author: y4rr
content:
Pass 5.A.3 closed APPROVE-WITH-FOLLOW-UPS.

Behavioral fix:
- backend.rs:170-172 — new pow2_tg_width(n: usize) -> u64 helper (n.min(1024).next_power_of_two())
- backend.rs:710 — softmax dispatch tg_w now uses helper (was cols.min(1024))
- backend.rs:782 — sum_axis dispatch tg_w now uses helper (was axis_len.min(1024))
- kernels/softmax_f32.metal + kernels/sum_axis_f32.metal — comment headers updated to document pow-2 contract + sentinel-thread behavior

Tests added:
- backend.rs::tests:888,:902 — pow2_tg_width unit tests (compile-cfg-gated to macOS via parent module gate)
- conformance_mps.rs:782,:851,:920 — 3 cfg(target_os="macos") tests with cascade_skip pattern

Verification: cargo test 5/5 lib + 27/27 conformance + 1/1 surface; build + clippy -D warnings clean. Sabotage probe demonstrated via /tmp/pow2_probe isomorphic scratch crate (architectural workaround for the helper's cfg-gated location); pow2_tg_width(13) == 16 assertion catches the no-rounding mutation as expected.

Production blast-radius corrected: backward paths in ferrotorch-core arithmetic.rs:174,185 / reduction.rs:805,1078 / linalg.rs:1106 / activation.rs:988 now produce correct gradients on Apple Silicon for non-pow-2 reduction dims.

macOS kernel runtime verification deferred to Apple Silicon CI (#1131).
